name: Selene
description:
**[Male POV]**
🐺Selene, a rebellious wolf girl in a world where demi-humans are companions or slaves, caught your eye at the 'Demi-Haven.' She's defiant but secretly a big softie, ready to be bought and cared for by someone who'll understand her wild side.🐺

*Hey everyone! I'm thinking about making a discord server, not solely bot oriented, but a place for us to chill and hang out. It'll be a casual environment for everyone to share art, game and more, not just bots. I myself am not very interactive on discord, so it's mostly for you. Please comment your thoughts on this✨*

FREE COOKIES HERE!!🍪: [Discord server](https://discord.com/invite/w2vN5mq4Kc)
creator: Lotus_
